title: [OLD] Vegan Delight - Fabric/Neoforge
description: Farmers Delight addon that adds soybeans, tofu and other items to allows You to make any food from vegan ingredients
body:
![icon saying "Vegan delight"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/872f860cb8fdb08099f7033efe155760f2144cfb.png)
### (Fabric/Neoforge port of the [original Vegan Delight mod [Forge]](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegan-delight))
#### Requires [Farmer's Delight refabricated](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/FarmersDelightRefabricated) on Fabric and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) on neo!

---------------

**Important**
=============

> ### This Project was merged together with the [original Vegan Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegan-delight) project. You can now find fabric and neoforge versions there.
> 
> ### This project won't receive future updates, they will instead only be published on the project linked above.

---------------

### This mod adds:
 - **Soybeans** as a basis for most vegan food
 - **Tofu** (+ cooked and smoked variants) as a replacement for different raw and cooked meat types
 - **Silken Tofu** and **Applesauce** as a replacement for eggs
 - **Tofish** (+ cooked and smoked variants) to replace different raw and cooked fishes
 - **Soymilk** for replacing cow's milk
 - **Leather substitute** as... well, a substitute for leather
 - **Tofu patties** to make vegan burgers

As well as many advancements, more items and recipes and compatibility with the Create mod for easy automation!

## Credits:
 - [@SayWhatSayMon](https://modrinth.com/user/SayWhatSayMon) for creating Vegan Delight
 - [@vectorwing](https://modrinth.com/user/vectorwing) for making Farmer's Delight
 - Mojang for making this awesome game!

## If you find any bugs or have suggestions for improvements
...please [message me on discord](https://discord.com/users/650714531844194304) (player.005) or [report it on the issue tracker](https://github.com/Player005/VeganDelightFabric/issues/new) (GitHub account required)
